positive: Stylized minimalist illustration of a majestic celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by floating constellations and ethereal vines. The owl should have clean, bold silhouette details, rendered in deep indigo, burnt orange, and luminous gold ink-wash style. The composition must be centrally focused and highly symmetrical, emphasizing negative space for clean print transfer. Flat vector aesthetic with subtle metallic foil accents. Clean lines, high contrast, suitable for apparel printing. Whimsical, magical, elegant.
